_meta.purpose: Seed for EtsyMail_Collateral collection. Each top-level key under 'items' is one document at EtsyMail_Collateral/<id>. Operator imports via the inbox UI's Collateral Library modal, or directly via Firestore console.
schemaNotes: category — what the AI's get_collateral tool searches by; matches the family or topic
url — public CDN URL the AI can reference in customer replies
description — shown to the AI when this item matches; must accurately summarize what's at the URL
keywords — extra match terms beyond category/kind
active — false hides from agent retrieval (for retiring stale collateral)
uploadInstructions: 1. Upload Goldfield_VS_Gold_Plated.jpg and Jewellery_care_guide.jpg to your CDN of choice (Cloudinary, Firebase Storage, etc.).
2. Replace the placeholder URL fields below with the actual public URLs.
3. Either import this seed directly to Firestore (collection EtsyMail_Collateral, doc IDs from the keys), OR open the Collateral Library modal in the inbox UI and add each entry by hand.

goldfield_vs_plated_card.name: About 14k Gold Filled — visual comparison
goldfield_vs_plated_card.description: Visual comparison of Solid Gold vs Gold Filled vs Gold Plated. Use when a customer asks about gold-filled durability, the difference between gold-filled and gold-plated, whether gold-filled tarnishes, or whether 14k Gold Filled is hypoallergenic. Key facts: 14k Gold Filled is hypoallergenic, has a thick layer of gold heat-bonded to a base, does not tarnish/flake/turn green like plated gold, and can last a lifetime.

jewelry_care_guide.name: Jewelry Care Guide — six-tip card
jewelry_care_guide.description: Six-tip jewelry care card. Use when a customer asks how to care for their piece, how to keep it shiny, whether they can wear it in the shower, whether perfume/lotion will damage it, how to store it, or how to clean it. Tips: avoid spraying perfume directly on jewelry (wear after spraying), remove before bathing/showering/swimming, avoid contact with creams/lotions/makeup/hairspray, remove before bed, clean with a soft cotton cloth, store separately in the supplied baggie or box.

huggie_line_sheet.name: Custom Huggie Charm Line Sheet
huggie_line_sheet.description: The customer-facing Custom Huggie Charm line sheet. Codes 1A-1P (charm size + metal), 2A-2F (hoop add-on), and 4A-4E (bulk savings). Reference this URL when a customer wants the visual sheet to pick from. The AI's resolveQuote tool already has the full code/price database loaded; this URL is for the CUSTOMER's visual reference, not the AI's pricing source.

necklace_line_sheet.name: Custom Necklace Charm Line Sheet
necklace_line_sheet.description: The customer-facing Custom Necklace Charm line sheet. Codes 1A-1P (charm size + metal), 2A-2B (engraving), 3A-3H (chain option), 4A-4D (length, only when chain selected), and 5A-5E (bulk savings). Note 3G (Beady Chain 14k Rose Gold Filled) is NOT AVAILABLE. Reference this URL when a customer wants the visual sheet.

stud_line_sheet.name: Custom Stud Earring Line Sheet
stud_line_sheet.description: The customer-facing Custom Stud Earring line sheet. Codes 1A-1P (stud size + metal), 2A pair / 2B single (60% of pair) / 2C mismatched pair (+$5), and 3A-3E (bulk savings). Pair price is the base; single is 60% of pair; mismatched is pair + $5. Reference this URL when a customer wants the visual sheet.
